hooks.command:
# claude-auto: /build-electron #
if unpushed=$(git rev-list @{u}..HEAD --count 2>/dev/null || echo 0); changes=$(git status --porcelain -- src/ electron/ package.json 2>/dev/null); [ "$unpushed" -gt 0 ] || [ -n "$changes" ]; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"Code changes detected (unpushed commits or modified files under src/, electron/, package.json). Run /build-electron now to bump the version, build the installer, and publish a GitHub release. Do not stop until the release is published and the working tree is clean and pushed.\"}"; fi
